description: ADNI participant identifier; primary key of this dataset.
derivation: carried byte-for-byte from mci_survival_primary_cohort_v1.tsv (frozen v1)
modeling_rule: NEVER a predictor. It carries site/enrolment-order information and would leak.
provenance_notes: One row per RID; 401 unique, sorted ascending.

description: Date of the plasma draw that anchors follow-up for this participant.
derivation: carried byte-for-byte from mci_survival_primary_cohort_v1.tsv (frozen v1)
modeling_rule: NEVER a predictor. Provenance and NACC harmonization only; calendar time is not a study variable.
provenance_notes: Defines t=0; not recomputed here.

description: Days from anchor_date to incident dementia, or to last dementia-free follow-up if censored.
derivation: carried byte-for-byte from mci_survival_primary_cohort_v1.tsv (frozen v1) (not recomputed)
modeling_rule: Duration term of the survival model. Always pair with event_indicator.
provenance_notes: Strictly positive for all 401; frozen by Build 1.

description: 1 = incident all-cause dementia during follow-up; 0 = censored dementia-free.
derivation: carried byte-for-byte from mci_survival_primary_cohort_v1.tsv (frozen v1) (not recomputed)
modeling_rule: Event term of the survival model. 0 means CENSORED, not 'stable' — never treat it as a binary progression label.
provenance_notes: 85 events / 316 censored; frozen by Build 1.

description: Age at study entry.
derivation: carried byte-for-byte from mci_survival_primary_cohort_v1.tsv (frozen v1)
modeling_rule: Core predictor in M0 and M1.
provenance_notes: UNDATED upstream: age at ENTRY, not age at the anchor draw. Documented limitation.

description: Number of APOE e4 alleles.
derivation: carried byte-for-byte from mci_survival_primary_cohort_v1.tsv (frozen v1)
modeling_rule: Core predictor in M0 and M1. NEVER include together with APOE4_CARRIER — they encode the same variable and are collinear by construction.
provenance_notes: Complete in the primary cohort by cohort-C construction.

description: Binary APOE e4 carrier status.
derivation: (APOE4_COUNT >= 1).astype(int)
modeling_rule: Alternative coding of APOE4_COUNT for sensitivity analysis. NEVER include together with APOE4_COUNT in the same model.
provenance_notes: Derived in this build; deterministic function of APOE4_COUNT.

description: Plasma phosphorylated tau 217, raw scale.
derivation: carried byte-for-byte from mci_survival_primary_cohort_v1.tsv (frozen v1)
modeling_rule: Retained for AUDITABILITY / traceability. Prefer the log form for modeling; NEVER put the raw and log form of the same biomarker in one model. log_ptau217 is the modeling form used in M1.
provenance_notes: Fujirebio platform. Strictly positive for all 401 (asserted).

description: Natural log of plasma p-tau217.
derivation: np.log(ptau217)  [natural log]
modeling_rule: The p-tau217 term of M1. NEVER include together with raw ptau217.
provenance_notes: numpy.log; every input finite and strictly positive (asserted).

description: Plasma glial fibrillary acidic protein, raw scale.
derivation: carried byte-for-byte from mci_survival_primary_cohort_v1.tsv (frozen v1)
modeling_rule: Retained for AUDITABILITY / traceability. Prefer the log form for modeling; NEVER put the raw and log form of the same biomarker in one model. log_gfap is the modeling form.
provenance_notes: Quanterix panel. Missing for exactly the same 40 participants as nfl.

description: Natural log of plasma GFAP.
derivation: np.log(gfap)  [natural log; NA preserved where gfap is NA]
modeling_rule: Candidate extension to M1. NEVER include together with raw gfap.
provenance_notes: numpy.log; NA mask identical to gfap (asserted).

description: Plasma neurofilament light chain, raw scale.
derivation: carried byte-for-byte from mci_survival_primary_cohort_v1.tsv (frozen v1)
modeling_rule: Retained for AUDITABILITY / traceability. Prefer the log form for modeling; NEVER put the raw and log form of the same biomarker in one model. log_nfl is the modeling form.
provenance_notes: Quanterix panel. Missing for exactly the same 40 participants as gfap.

description: Natural log of plasma NfL.
derivation: np.log(nfl)  [natural log; NA preserved where nfl is NA]
modeling_rule: Candidate extension to M1. NEVER include together with raw nfl.
provenance_notes: numpy.log; NA mask identical to nfl (asserted).

description: Plasma amyloid-beta 42, raw scale.
derivation: carried byte-for-byte from mci_survival_primary_cohort_v1.tsv (frozen v1)
modeling_rule: Retained for AUDITABILITY as the ratio numerator. Model the ratio, not the component; NEVER include a component alongside ratio_ab42_ab40.
provenance_notes: Fujirebio platform; same assay row as abeta40.

description: Plasma amyloid-beta 40, raw scale.
derivation: carried byte-for-byte from mci_survival_primary_cohort_v1.tsv (frozen v1)
modeling_rule: Retained for AUDITABILITY as the ratio denominator. Model the ratio, not the component; NEVER include a component alongside ratio_ab42_ab40.
provenance_notes: Fujirebio platform; strictly positive wherever observed (asserted).

description: Plasma amyloid-beta 42 to 40 ratio.
derivation: abeta42 / abeta40  (carried from the frozen column; recomputation verified to agree at rtol=1e-10, atol=1e-12)
modeling_rule: Candidate extension to M1. NEVER include together with abeta42 or abeta40.
provenance_notes: Both components come from the same assay row; NA where either component is NA.

description: PARTICIPANT-level field whose VALUE is a count of dementia diagnosis RECORDS dated strictly before this participant's anchor. A record count, not a participant count.
derivation: carried byte-for-byte from mci_survival_primary_cohort_v1.tsv (frozen v1)
modeling_rule: QC / sensitivity only. NEVER a predictor, and NEVER a filter for the shared primary dataset. Use only in an explicitly-labelled sensitivity analysis.
provenance_notes: Build 1 §6.1 identified 8 PARTICIPANTS in anchor cohort A with pre-anchor dementia; 4 of them remain in this frozen primary cohort (RIDs 467, 4115, 4506, 4706), carrying 12 diagnosis RECORDS in total (5+4+2+1). The circulated '8' is a participant count in cohort A, never a record count. All 4 are RETAINED; adjudication pending.

description: PARTICIPANT-level binary flag: this participant has >= 1 dementia diagnosis on or before the anchor. True for exactly 4 participants.
derivation: carried byte-for-byte from mci_survival_primary_cohort_v1.tsv (frozen v1)
modeling_rule: QC / sensitivity only. NEVER a predictor, and NEVER a filter for the shared primary dataset. Use only in an explicitly-labelled sensitivity analysis.
provenance_notes: Equivalent to pre_anchor_dementia_n > 0 (asserted). Exactly 1 of the 4 flagged participants is an event (RID 467). Retained, not excluded.

description: 1 if the participant has complete data for core predictors (entry_age, APOE4_COUNT, log_ptau217); else 0. 401 eligible.
derivation: (entry_age & APOE4_COUNT & log_ptau217 predictors (entry_age, APOE4_COUNT, log_ptau217)) all notna(), cast to int
modeling_rule: Analysis-set selector. NEVER a predictor — use it only to subset rows to the participants who have the required features.
provenance_notes: Derived from observed nonmissingness only — never manually assigned. Counts reconciled against mci_survival_analysis_set_counts_v1.tsv.

description: 1 if the participant has complete data for core + log_gfap; else 0. 361 eligible.
derivation: (entry_age & APOE4_COUNT & log_ptau217 + log_gfap) all notna(), cast to int
modeling_rule: Analysis-set selector. NEVER a predictor — use it only to subset rows to the participants who have the required features.
provenance_notes: Derived from observed nonmissingness only — never manually assigned. Counts reconciled against mci_survival_analysis_set_counts_v1.tsv.
